steps.title: Spot the defining action
steps.content: The tides “reshape the deltaic lobes over time”—they actively modify the delta's shape and size.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content: ”Influenced” means “affected” or “had an effect on,” which is exactly what's needed when describing how one force continuously modifies something. The other three don't express this causal relationship. That matches choice C — C is correct.
